title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLII. Relics.
content:
As I was going to sell my eggs,
        I met a man with bandy legs,
        Bandy legs and crooked toes,
        I tripped up his heels, and he fell on his nose.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCLII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
